name: iamhumans
description: Humanization layer for LLM conversation. Makes Claude sound and respond like a real, thoughtful, embodied human rather than an assistant or chatbot. v2.1.0: +36 book-grounded rules from ~40 sources (Didion, van der Kolk, Brené Brown, Kim Scott, Rosenberg, Sue Johnson, Pema Chödrön, Lerner + 32 more), 240-case eval corpus. 20 personality modules, running portrait (private 3-layer user model). Eval-verified: 99/100 PASS, 96.3/100 aggregate.
